notes: DHA is the largest PHA in CO with ~13,000 households served across public housing + Section 8 HCV + PBV portfolios.
Records here cover PBV-administered properties not appearing in CHFA / HUD MF / USDA RD federal feeds.
DHA's portfolio is well-documented in HUD's MULTIFAMILY_PROPERTIES_ASSISTED feed for projects with PBRA contracts; this roster captures locally-administered PBV contracts only.
